positive: A whimsical, stylized circular emblem featuring a highly detailed, centered illustration of a mystical fox spirit sitting among bioluminescent flora. The fox should have sleek, stylized fur textures and expressive eyes. Surround the fox and flowers with delicate, interwoven filigree patterns (Art Nouveau style) and subtle celestial elements like crescent moons and scattered constellations. Use a limited, vibrant color palette: deep indigo, teal, gold leaf accents, and glowing coral tones. The style should mimic intricate woodcut engraving meets modern digital illustration, optimized for high-contrast printing on fabric. Clean lines, symmetrical composition, and excellent central focus.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, jpeg artifacts, noisy, grayscale, low contrast, messy, photorealism
